missions.title: Biotechnology and Its Applications - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering principles of biotechnology, genetic engineering, restriction enzymes and more.

microtargets.title: Principles of biotechnology
ncertAnchors: NCERT Biology Class 12, Principles of biotechnology
mustKnowFacts: Principles of biotechnology is a fundamental subtopic of Biotechnology and Its Applications.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Principles of biotechnology for NEET.

diagrams.name: Diagram showing principles of biotechnology
commonLabelTraps: Confusing Part A with Part B in principles of biotechnology

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Principles of biotechnology during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Principles of biotechnology.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Principles of biotechnology.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Principles of biotechnology.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Principles of biotechnology.
What is a common trap associated with Principles of biotechnology?
